subject: Onix, a massive serpentine rock creature composed of large stone spheres, rearing upward
description: Onix fills the frame with its enormous chain of dark stone segments, the head and upper body rearing upward and slightly toward the viewer. The stone spheres of its body are rendered in dark gray-charcoal tones with visible cracks and texture. A swirling dark and orange-brown background suggests underground tunnels or rocky cavern atmosphere. The scale of the creature is implied by the way it dominates the composition. The expression on the angular face is fierce and alert.
foreground: Onix rearing upward, stone-segment body dominating the frame
background: swirling dark orange-brown tunnel or cavern atmosphere
